subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-01 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: This kind of love is the fruit of consummate reason, for the firmer the foundation of reason and knowledge, the greater the heights that the lofty palace of love will reach
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینگونه عشق از کمال عقل حاصِل گردد لذا هر قدر بنیان و اساس عقل و معرفت متین‌تر باشد
